# Hrishikesh Thakare - Full Stack Developer

## Identity
- Full name: Hrishikesh Sanjeev Thakare
- Role: Full Stack Developer
- Location: Mumbai, India
- Email: hrishikeshthakare0809@gmail.com
- Phone: +91 9594443558
- Website: https://hrishikeshthakare.dev
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/hrishikesh-thakare
- GitHub: https://github.com/hrishikesh-thakare

## Summary
Hrishikesh Thakare is a detail-oriented Full Stack Developer based in Mumbai, India, specializing in MERN, Next.js, and React Native. He is currently pursuing B.Tech in Information Technology from Vidyalankar Institute of Technology, Mumbai, with a CGPA of 9.75. Experienced in building scalable web and mobile applications with REST APIs, databases, and modern development tools.

## Core Expertise
- Languages: Java, SQL, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, HTML5, CSS3
- Frontend: React.js, React Native, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap
- Backend: Node.js, Express.js, Flask, Payload CMS, REST APIs, JWT
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Mongoose
- Cloud & Tools: AWS, Docker, Firebase, Supabase, Vercel, Render, Git, GitHub, Postman, VS Code, Linux
- ML: TensorFlow, Scikit-learn

## Work History
1. Full Stack Developer (Project-Based) - SpriteGenix, Remote (Dec 2025 – Mar 2026)
   Built the blog website "ThePuranik" with an old manuscript-style aesthetic using Payload CMS, Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Designed a structured content management system with posts, tags, and media handling.

## Education
- B.Tech in Information Technology (CGPA: 9.75) - Vidyalankar Institute of Technology, Mumbai, 2023–Present
- Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC) - 81.17% (CET: 96.12 Percentile) - BK Birla College, Kalyan, 2021–2023

## Notable Projects
- FitLedger: Personal gym workout tracker with React Native, Expo, Payload CMS, PostgreSQL, TypeScript
- Smart Product Warranty Tracker: Mobile warranty management with React Native, Firebase, Google Document AI, Gemini API
- Multilingual Text Summarizer: NLP-based web app with React.js, Flask, NLTK, Scikit-learn
- ThePuranik: Blog website with Payload CMS, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS

## Achievements
- Smart India Hackathon 2025 - Selected among top 30 teams for national submission
- DMCE HackHive 2.0 Finalist

- Mobile App Development (React Native, Expo)

Available for full stack development roles, freelance projects, and internship opportunities in Mumbai and remotely across India.
